title: Find Target Indices After Sorting Array
titleCn: 找出数组排序后的目标下标

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,5,2,3], target = 2 Output: [1,2] Explanation: After sorting, nums is [1,2,2,3,5]. The indices where nums[i] == 2 are 1 and 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: [1,2] Explanation: After sorting, nums is [1,2,2,3,5]. The indices where nums[i] == 2 are 1 and 2.

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,5,2,3], target = 3 Output: [3] Explanation: After sorting, nums is [1,2,2,3,5]. The index where nums[i] == 3 is 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: [3] Explanation: After sorting, nums is [1,2,2,3,5]. The index where nums[i] == 3 is 3.

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,5,2,3], target = 5 Output: [4] Explanation: After sorting, nums is [1,2,2,3,5]. The index where nums[i] == 5 is 4.
testcases.expectedOutput: [4] Explanation: After sorting, nums is [1,2,2,3,5]. The index where nums[i] == 5 is 4.
